ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin (e.g., TCK, TMS) */,
  "bank_number" INTEGER /* Bank number associated with the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of pin (e.g., Dedicated, General Purpose) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the pin (e.g., Input, Output) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of pin functionality */,
  "electrical_characteristics" TEXT /* Electrical characteristics of the pin (e.g., voltage levels, impedance) */,
  "configuration_protocol" TEXT /* Configuration protocol used for the pin (e.g., JTAG, SPI, I2C) */,
  "default_state" TEXT /* Default state of the pin (e.g., high, low, tri-state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_bank_number FOREIGN KEY ("bank_number") REFERENCES banks ("bank_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_pin_type FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type") REFERENCES pin_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_number" INTEGER /* Number identifier for the bank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bank's purpose or functionality */,
  "bank_type" TEXT /* Type of bank (e.g., I/O, power, ground) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of pin */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin type (e.g., Dedicated, General Purpose) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin type including usage specifics */,
  "pin_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of pin (e.g., input, output, bidirectional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the design */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the design */,
  "design_status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., draft, in-review, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being used */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design utilizing the pin */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of this usage entry */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the pin's use in the design */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Brief description of how the pin is used in the design */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the pin usage (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_usage_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_usage_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the pin configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being collaborated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
